plugins.name: cgel
plugins.description: Contract-Gated Evidence Loop — sealed task contracts, hash-chained verification evidence, budgeted iterations, read-only semantic verifier, evidence-gated PASS, no AI attribution on commits/PRs.

plugins.name: deck-master
plugins.description: Builds editable .pptx decks from structured data with no presentation library, no template and no rendering engine. Diagram-first: architecture, flow and comparison slides rather than bullet lists. Text is measured against real Arial metrics before any box is sized, so nothing overflows; a geometric audit blocks collisions, off-canvas shapes and dangling connectors; output is validated against the published ISO-29500 schemas and is byte-for-byte deterministic. Runs on the Python standard library alone.
